routes.name: Main Route
routes.description: Walk from Westlake Station to Cal Anderson Park and discover the story of CHOP.

stops.name: Westlake Station
stops.description: The starting point of your journey. CHOP began here in June 2020.

stops.name: 11th & Pine
stops.description: The heart of CHOP, where community gathered and voices were heard.

stops.name: Cal Anderson Park
stops.description: The final destination and center of the CHOP community.
